title: mentha × verticillata subsp. acutifolia
intro: Mentha × verticillata subsp. acutifolia, also known as American mint or wild mint, is a subspecies of mint that is native to North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a popular remedy for digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Mentha × verticillata subsp. acutifolia include relieving nausea, soothing sore throats, and reducing stress, among others. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make a variety of products including mouthwashes, creams, and ointments.
